title: GoalOS Loop Contract Lab V1 Reference Docket
claim: A long-running agent loop becomes reviewable when it has role contracts, disk state, readable traces, restart semantics, evaluator independence, and an Evidence Docket plan.
claim_boundary: Public-alpha browser-local demonstration. Not a model execution system. Not production authority.
boundary: No user data. No user funds. No wallet. No transaction. No network call. No production authority. Human review required.
